nasb.text: Then they brought him on horses and he was buried at Jerusalem with his fathers in the city of David.

esv.text: And they brought him on horses; and he was buried in Jerusalem with his fathers in the city of David.

cnv.text: 他們把他的屍首馱在馬背上運回來，葬在耶路撒冷，在大衛的城裡，和他的祖先在一起。

ccb.text: 有人用马将他的尸体驮回耶路撒冷，葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。
